vibe: Authentic, Luxury, Sacred, Calm, Elegant, Trustworthy, Traditional with Modern UI

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-20, p-24 for section padding.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Subtle roundness, max 4px to 8px (rounded-sm or rounded-md) for an elegant, non-childish look.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grids for collections. Asymmetric layouts for storytelling sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#B85D19] text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[#9A4D14] transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: border border-[#D1C7B1] text-[#2C1E16] bg-transparent px-8 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[#F5F2EA] transition-all duration-300

cards.product_card: bg-white border border-[#D1C7B1]/40 rounded-md overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(44,30,22,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.journal_card: bg-[#F5F2EA] rounded-md overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

navigation.header: bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D1C7B1]/30 sticky top-0 z-50
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-wider text-[#594A3C] hover:text-[#B85D19] transition-colors

home_page.details: Full-width slider/video with dark overlay (max bg-black/30). Huge Cormorant Garamond heading. Primary CTA to Shop.
Asymmetric bento grid of categories (Mukhi, Origin, Mala). Ivory and Gold accents.
Carousel of Best Sellers. Product cards with crisp images, subtle borders, and Copper add-to-inquiry buttons.
Text-heavy storytelling section. Light Sand background. Use 'overline' typography. Minimalist iconography.
Elegant sliding text over a serene temple architecture background (with dark or light overlay).
3-column grid of latest articles. Natural earthy imagery.
Deep Brown (#2C1E16) background with Ivory text for high luxury contrast. Massive 'MV Rudraksh' logo typography in footer.

shop_page.layout: 2-column layout on desktop: Left sidebar for advanced filters (Category, Mukhi, Origin, Size, Weight, Price), Right grid for products.
shop_page.product_grid: 3 or 4 columns (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4). gap-8.

product_details_page.layout: Split layout: Sticky product details on right, scrollable image gallery on left.
sections: WhatsApp Order CTA (Primary) + UPI info text
Accordion/Tabs for: Specifications, Certificates, Mantra, Planet, Deity, Chakra

admin_cms.theme: Swiss & High-Contrast variant but keeping the warm brand colors. Dense, functional.
admin_cms.tables: bg-white rounded-md border border-[#D1C7B1]/40 shadow-sm. Use Shadcn Table.
admin_cms.forms: Product creation with Shadcn Form, Input, Select, and Tabs for organizing product data (Basic Info, SEO, Spiritual Specs).

motion_and_animation.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_animation.hover_effects: Image scaling within overflow-hidden containers (scale-105 duration-700).
motion_and_animation.micro_interactions: Button text slide-up or arrow translate-x on hover.

image_urls.description: blue and gold beaded bracelet / close up of mala beads
Serene corridor of a traditional Hindu temple showcasing wooden architecture and brass bells.
Discover ancient stone temples surrounded by dense greenery in a serene forest landscape.
Incense smoke sitting in a bowl on a table

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS purely for styling with the provided color palette.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts are imported via Google Fonts.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or purple gradients anywhere on the site.
Every button and interactive element must have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='shop-now-button').
Use Shadcn UI components for complex logic (Select, Dialog, Tabs, Table for Admin) but customize the Tailwind classes to match the 'Organic & Earthy Luxury' archetype.
The hero section should use bg-black/30 or bg-black/40 overlay max; do not obscure the images heavily.
Include WhatsApp inquiry functionality on the product page as requested (no direct online payment gateway checkout).
